personal.headline: Aerospace Engineering Student
personal.tagline: Student in Aerospace Engineering focused on space systems, avionics, power systems integration and student-led aerospace projects.

summary: Aerospace Engineering student at Universidad Rey Juan Carlos with experience in student satellite projects, avionics and power systems integration, and student representation. Interested in space systems engineering, avionics, electrical power systems, and technical project coordination.

experience.title: Avionics and Power Systems Integration Team Leader
experience.description:
Led the avionics and power systems integration team within the S-ART student satellite project.
Coordinated subsystem interfaces, integration planning, and technical documentation across engineering teams.
Contributed to early mission definition and electrical power subsystem (EPS) trade studies.

experience.title: Vocal — URJC Representative
experience.organization: Asociación de Estudiantes de Aeronáutica y Espacio (AEAE)
experience.description:
Represented Universidad Rey Juan Carlos in the national aerospace students' association (AEAE).
Coordinated information exchange between the association and URJC students, and participated in national aerospace student events.

projects.name: S-ART Student Satellite Project
projects.description: Student satellite project developed within Cosmos Aerospace Association, focused on early-stage space systems engineering and subsystem integration.
